scenario.name: Basic UAS OneX simulator receives INVITE and Receives BYE
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] Content-Length: 0 User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator

SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] Contact: <sip:50001@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,INFO,PUBLISH,REFER,UPDATE,PRACK User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Require: 100rel RSeq: 1 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 1 200 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 120 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,INFO,PUBLISH,REFER,UPDATE,PRACK Contact: <sip:50001@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Accept-Language: en User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Length: [len]

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_From:] [$to1];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] [$cseq1] [$via1] [$rr1] Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,INFO,PUBLISH,REFER,UPDATE,PRACK Contact: <sip:50001@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Accept-Language: en User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Length: [len]
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Via:] User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Length: [len]
